title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0142 76A Savoy Road, Brislington, Bristol, BS4 3SY
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Habibo Homes Ltd  Site address:  76A Savoy Road, Brislington, Bristol, BS4 3SY  Description of proposed development:  Erection of a first floor extension, ground floor rear extension and internal alterations to facilitate the change of use of the property from a 5-bedroom House in Multiple Occupation (HMO) to a 8- bedroom House in Multiple Occupation (HMO) (Use Class Sui Generis)  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   TBC  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 5 December 2025   Date by when representations must be made 13 January 2026   Hearing date and venue TBC   Target Decision 30 January 2026   Decision date TBC     Hearing Documents  Decision  Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 13 January 2026.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT, 69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0142 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     76a Savoy rd - 8 bed hmo covering letter  (PDF, 293 KB, 15 pages)  application form  (PDF, 2.59 MB, 14 pages)  BCC BNG Screening Assessment - BNG Exemption Statement  (PDF, 694 KB, 9 pages)  CIL-FORM 1 QUESTION FORM ADDITIONAL INFORMATION  (PDF, 587 KB, 6 pages)  Sustainability Statement & Energy Strategy  (PDF, 140 KB, 9 pages)  1 - SITE LOCATION - A001  (PDF, 571 KB, 1 page)  2 - EXISTING BLOCK PLAN A002  (PDF, 151 KB, 1 page)  3 - PROPOSED BLOCK PLAN - A003  (PDF, 910 KB, 1 page)  4 - EXISTING GROUND FLOOR LAYOUT - A004  (PDF, 53 KB, 1 page)  5 - EXISTING FIRST FLOOR LAYOUT - A005  (PDF, 51.5...
